title: Quantification of Circulating MicroRNA Using Single TaqMan Assays
author: Helle Glud Binderup
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q9edz3e
materials: use 5 ml of EDTA anticoagulated whole blood
TaqMan®MicroRNA Reverse Transcription Kit Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #4366597 20X TaqMan MicroRNA Assay Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #4440887
2X TaqMan Universal PCR Master Mix Applied Biosystems (ThermoFisher Scientific) Catalog #4318157 20X TaqMan MicroRNA Assay Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #4440887

steps.title: centrifuge at 3000 g for 30...
steps.instruction: centrifuge at 3000 g for 30 minutes (acceleration 5, brake 6, temperature 18 °C)

steps.title: transfer plasma phase to cryo-tubes, leaving approximately 0
steps.instruction: transfer plasma phase to cryo-tubes, leaving approximately 0.5 ml of plasma on top of the buffy coat

steps.title: after addition of isopropanol, add also...
steps.instruction: after addition of isopropanol, add also 5 µL spike-in (cel-miR-39, 2.75 × 10 −12 M)

steps.title: Prepare RT master mix
steps.instruction: Prepare RT master mix: %s %s *add 10-20% excess volume **add water to a total reaction volume of 15 µL (including microRNA and RT-primers, see step 7) Mix gently and place on ice Remember to include a RT-negative sample (no template) It is also a good idea to include a RT-positive sample (a microRNA-sample included in all runs)

steps.title: For each RT reaction, combine RT...
steps.instruction: For each RT reaction, combine RT master mix with 2 µL of purified microRNA in a 0.2 µL polypropylene reaction tube (the volume of RT master mix is dependent on the number of RT-primers, see step 7) Keep on ice

steps.title: Prepare RT primer mix
steps.instruction: Prepare RT primer mix: Add for each RT reaction 0.75 µL 20x RT primer from each microRNA assay set Example with two microRNA assays: %s %s Component Volume per 15 µL reaction* 20x RT specific primer #1 0.75 µL 20x RT specific primer #2 0.75 µL Total volume 1.5 µL** *add 10-20% excess volume **when using two microRNA assays the volume of water needed in step 5 is 8.66 µL for each reaction, and the volume of master mix added in step 6 is 11.5 µL Mix gently

substeps.instruction: Prepare RT primer mix: Add for each RT reaction
µL 20x RT primer from each microRNA assay set Example with two microRNA assays: %s %s Component Volume per 15 µL reaction* 20x RT specific primer #1
µL** *add 10-20% excess volume **when using two microRNA assays the volume of water needed in step 5 is
µL for each reaction, and the volume of master mix added in step 6 is

steps.title: Add the appropiate volume of RT...
steps.instruction: Add the appropiate volume of RT primer mix to the reaction tubes prepared in step 6 Mix gently and incubate on ice for 5 minutes

steps.title: Transfer the reaction tubes to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer the reaction tubes to a termocycler Incubate at 16 °C for 30 min, at 42 °C for 30 min and at 85 °C for 5 min.

steps.title: Continue immediately to the PCR amplification...
steps.instruction: Continue immediately to the PCR amplification or store the RT-reaction in -20 °C.

steps.title: Prepare qPCR reaction mix (run each sample in doublets)
steps.instruction: Prepare qPCR reaction mix (run each sample in doublets): %s %s *add 10-20% excess volume Mix gently

steps.title: Combine 19 µL of qPCR reaction mix with 1
steps.instruction: Combine 19 µL of qPCR reaction mix with 1.3 µL of RT-reaction (cDNA) in a 96 well plate Seal plate

steps.title: Transfer plate to ABI Prism 7900HT...
steps.instruction: Transfer plate to ABI Prism 7900HT Use the SDS software to set up the run Incubate in 50 °C for 2 min and 95 °C for 10 min Proceed with 40 cycles of 95 °C for 15 sec and 60 °C for 60 sec.

steps.title: Normalization is performed using the ΔCt-method...
steps.instruction: Normalization is performed using the ΔCt-method (2 -ΔCt ) ΔCt = mean Ct target miRNA - mean Ct cel-miR-39 (mean of doublets)
